name: Nightfall AI
description: Monitor Nightfall AI cloud DLP policies, data violations, scan capabilities, and detection rules to ensure sensitive data is identified and protected across Slack, GitHub, Jira, and other SaaS applications.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to the Nightfall Dashboard at https://app.nightfall.ai
2. Go to Settings (gear icon) > API Keys, or navigate to https://app.nightfall.ai/developer-platform/api-keys
3. Click 'Create API Key' and give it a descriptive name
4. Copy the API key (starts with 'NF-')
5. Paste the API key below

Note: The API key must be kept secret. Do not share it in publicly accessible areas.

checks.name: Data Masking
checks.description: Verifies that the Nightfall AI DLP scan endpoint is accessible and can detect sensitive data types (PII, PCI, secrets) with redaction capabilities configured

checks.name: Secure Secrets
checks.description: Verifies that Nightfall AI can detect exposed secrets such as API keys, cryptographic keys, database connection strings, and passwords in scanned content

checks.name: Monitoring & Alerting
checks.description: Verifies that the Nightfall violation monitoring API is accessible and checks for active DLP violations across connected SaaS applications (Slack, GitHub, Jira, Google Drive, etc.)

checks.name: Secure Code
checks.description: Verifies that Nightfall can detect secrets and sensitive data patterns commonly found in source code, including API keys, passwords in code, and connection strings
